summary: The session focused on how businesses can leverage user-generated content (UGC) to enhance engagement and drive conversions through online channels. The user sought examples of successful UGC strategies and tips for small businesses, expressing concerns about managing UGC effectively.
facts: The user is interested in leveraging user-generated content to improve engagement and drive conversions for their small business. The user appreciates examples of businesses successfully using user-generated content, such as GoPro, Airbnb, Starbucks, and Glossier. The user is looking for suggestions on how small businesses can start using user-generated content strategies. The user expressed concern about the overwhelming nature of managing user-generated content. The user found the idea of using a content management system to curate user-generated content particularly appealing. TINT is a user-generated content management tool that starts at $299 per month. HeyStacks is a user-generated content management tool that starts at $99 per month. Curator.io is a user-generated content management tool that starts at $29 per month. Taggbox is a user-generated content management tool that starts at $15 per month.
